query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of two large paneled doors standing ajar, symmetrically framing a narrow vertical view of a brick wall behind them. A bright light source mounted on the wall emits beams that extend diagonally across the door surfaces. The doors feature raised rectangular panels arranged in a grid pattern, and the mortar lines of the brickwork are visible in the central gap.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred black and white photograph of two large paneled doors standing ajar, symmetrically framing a narrow brick wall with a severely overexposed light fixture at its center. Intentional blur softens the architectural edges and stretches the light into diagonal streaks across the paneling, while extreme exposure crushes the surrounding doors into deep shadow and obliterates detail at the bright central source. The resulting darkness and blinding illumination evoke atmospheric distress, creating an unsettling sense of dread and an oppressive threshold into an unknown space.
